subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Every news and event that reacheth from any place, write thou thereof, whether by thine own hand or otherwise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان هر خبر و حوادثی که از جاای میرسد مرقوم دارید یا خود مثل
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir], @review of publications
